heading: Eligibility to receive grants
label: 12252 Eligibility to receive grants
text: To be eligible to receive a grant under , a State shall submit to the Attorney General an application at such time, in such form, and containing such information as the Attorney General reasonably may require by rule.section 12251 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 13892 of Title 42
